all.en: This message is a friendly reminder regarding outstanding invoices.
all.zh: 本訊息為友善提醒您仍有未結清之發票。

all.en: Our standard payment terms are net thirty from the invoice date.
all.zh: 本公司標準付款條件為發票日後三十天淨付款。

all.en: Several invoices on your account are approaching the due date.
all.zh: 您帳戶上有數張發票即將屆滿付款期。

all.en: Invoice number A four five six two is due on Friday next week.
all.zh: 發票編號A四五六二將於下週五到期。

all.en: The outstanding balance currently totals eighteen thousand dollars.
all.zh: 目前未結清餘額合計為一萬八千美元。

all.en: Please confirm receipt of all listed invoices at your earliest convenience.
all.zh: 請於方便時儘速確認已收到所列各筆發票。

all.en: Wire transfer remains our preferred method for payment settlement.
all.zh: 電匯仍為本公司偏好的結帳方式。

all.en: Bank routing details are included in the footer of each invoice.
all.zh: 銀行匯款資訊載於每張發票之頁尾。

all.en: Please reference the invoice number when initiating any transfer.
all.zh: 進行匯款時請務必註記對應之發票編號。

all.en: Credit card payments are accepted but subject to a processing fee.
all.zh: 亦可使用信用卡付款，惟須加收處理手續費。

all.en: Late payments accrue interest at one point five percent monthly.
all.zh: 逾期款項將以月息百分之一點五計息。

all.en: Accounts past sixty days may be referred to collections review.
all.zh: 逾期超過六十天之帳戶可能轉交催收程序審核。

all.en: Repeated delays may impact your future credit terms with us.
all.zh: 多次延遲可能影響日後與本公司之信用額度條件。

all.en: If you anticipate any delay, please contact us in advance.
all.zh: 若預期將有延遲，請事先與我們聯繫。

all.en: We can discuss installment plans for unexpected cash flow issues.
all.zh: 如遇突發資金狀況可商議分期付款方案。

all.en: Statement copies can be resent upon request from your team.
all.zh: 如您團隊有需要可再次寄送對帳單副本。

all.en: Dispute resolution should be raised within seven days of invoice receipt.
all.zh: 如有爭議應於收到發票後七天內提出。

all.en: Please direct billing questions to the accounts receivable team.
all.zh: 帳務疑問請洽應收帳款團隊。

all.en: Online payment portal access remains available around the clock.
all.zh: 線上付款入口全天候開放使用。

all.en: Your prompt attention helps us maintain a smooth working relationship.
all.zh: 您及時的回應有助於維持順暢的合作關係。

all.en: Thank you for your continued partnership and timely cooperation.
all.zh: 感謝您長期合作以及及時的配合。

all.en: We look forward to receiving payment confirmation soon.
all.zh: 我們期待儘快收到您的付款確認。
